leagueMatchEvent.name: Reefslider Rally
leagueMatchEvent.desc:
Rev up your Reefsliders, and ride
into battle!
leagueMatchEvent.regulation:
Who's got two pectoral fins and is ready to ride? Literally every player in this Challenge!

・ You can only use weapons that come with the Reefslider special.
・ The special gauge will fill quickly all by itself!
・ Only primary gear abilities will be enabled! Secondary abilities will have no effect.

leagueMatchEvent.name: Monthly Challenge
leagueMatchEvent.desc: Aim for the highest Challenge Power!
leagueMatchEvent.regulation:
How high can you get your Challenge Power this month?

・ Only primary gear abilities will be enabled in Turf War battles. Secondary gear abilities will have no effect!
・ There will be no limits on gear abilities in Anarchy Battle modes!
